response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:47: Intro dance sequence. No vocal music. 2. 00:47: Identified 'side by side' via on-screen text and audio. Performed by Fuwa Moco. Original composition by Aiobahn+81 and Kris Roche. 3. Searched for 'side by side Aiobahn+81 Kris Roche lyrics' and found full lyrics. 4. 03:40-04:59: Outro talk. No vocal music.
response.global_summary: A video featuring VTubers Fuwa Moco performing an introductory dance, followed by their original vocal song 'side by side', and concluding with closing remarks.

scenes.description: The performers Fuwa Moco are on stage, posing and dancing as part of an intro sequence. No vocal music is playing.
The performers Fuwa Moco sing their original song 'side by side' while dancing on stage. Credits for the song are displayed on-screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Finally we made it through but not without some tears
With the help of friends so true we faced all of our fears
Now we're here to celebrate all that we have done
I can feel it's more than just a game of fate
'cause our stories have just begun
Hand in hand we're not waiting on tomorrow
From now on it's the heart that we will follow
We'll move on passed the heartbreak and the sorrow if you
Stay by my side
Stay by my side
Dancing harmonies feeding the music
As we come alive, and sparks ignite
We're making memories everyday underneath
The summer sky and through the night
We're singing melodies every time we hear music
From inside as hearts collide
Bringing out the best in each other now
We're feeling free like we're meant to be
Promise I will be there you can call me day or night
When you need a friend to lean on I'll be there as fast as light
Nothing's gonna keep us apart not even rain or snow
'cause we know that friendships glow and shine so bright
Melting away what we used to know
No matter how many times we feel we end up chasing our tails,
in the end things always work out.
Everything happens for a reason, and makes us stronger in the end!
I'll be by your side
Dancing harmonies feeding the music
As we come alive, and sparks ignite
We're making memories everyday underneath
The summer sky and through the night
We're singing melodies every time we hear music
From inside as hearts collide
Bringing out the best in each other now
We're feeling free like we're meant to be
Even though there's been rough times where nobody wanted us,
we kept going, and we kept dreaming, now we are here,
we're not alone anymore!
We'll be here together. We have smiles to protect! C'mon, let's go!
Hand in hand we're not waiting on tomorrow
From now on it's the heart that we will follow
We'll move on passed the heartbreak and the sorrow if you
Stay by my side
Dancing harmonies feeding the music
As we come alive, and sparks ignite
We're making memories everyday underneath
The summer sky and through the night
We're singing melodies every time we hear music
From inside as hearts collide
Bringing out the best in each other now
We're feeling free like we're meant to be
Nya nya nya nya nya nya

scenes.description: The performers Fuwa Moco conclude the performance and engage in closing remarks. No vocal music is playing.
